name: forjador-de-skills
description: Meta-skill for forging well-made Claude Code skills

plugins.name: forjador-de-skills
plugins.description: Use when scaffolding, packaging, or publishing a Claude Code skill plugin — writing its marketplace.json / plugin.json manifests, wiring it as a GitHub marketplace, naming it, stamping it from templates, or debugging why an update did not reach a session. A thin layer over superpowers:writing-skills; skill-creator is an optional helper.
